title: Can I show subitems progress in the parent item?
excerpt: Is there a way to utilize the progress bar on an item to indicate the statuses of all subitems linked?

posts.author: rebecca.knudson (Rebecca Knudson)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to utilize the progress bar on an item to indicate the statuses of all subitems linked?

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can show a summary of a subitem status column in the parent item. I think this is what you are looking for. You can activate it in the settings of the subitem status column.

image828×568 40.2 KB

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rebecca.knudson - To add to what Eltjo mentioned, you can also automate changing the main status of the item when all subitems statuses = something. It’s in the Automations area.

If you need any more help with this, feel free to PM me.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
